name: Contact nav link navigates to the contact page with working contact methods
description: Clicking Contact in the sidebar navigation goes to /contact and shows the three contact methods with correct details.

planSteps.description: Click the 'Contact' link in the sidebar navigation
Verify the browser navigates to the /contact page showing three contact method entries labeled Email, LinkedIn, and GitHub
Verify the Email contact method displays the address liuchunfei682@163.com
